mapper.sql: A.CTSNN_ID AS ctsnnId , A.USER_ID AS usid , A.CTSNN_CODE AS ctsnnCd , A.REQST_DE AS reqstDe , A.CTSNN_NM AS ctsnnNm , A.TRGTER_NM AS trgterNm , A.BRTHDY AS brth , A.OCCRRNC_DE AS occrrDe , A.RELATE AS relate , A.RM AS remark , A.SANCTNER_ID AS sanctnerId , A.CONFM_AT AS confmAt , A.SANCTN_DT AS sanctnDt , A.RETURN_RESN AS returnResn , A.INFRML_SANCTN_ID AS infrmlSanctnId , TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS frstRegisterPnttm , A.FRST_REGISTER_ID AS frstRegisterId , (SELECT C.USER_NM FROM VW_USER_MASTER C WHERE C.ESNTL_ID = A.USER_ID) AS usNm , (SELECT S.USER_NM FROM VW_USER_MASTER S WHERE S.ESNTL_ID = A.SANCTNER_ID) AS sanctnerNm , A.CTSNN_CODE AS ctsnnCdNm

sql.if: AND (SELECT C.USER_NM FROM VW_USER_MASTER C WHERE C.ESNTL_ID = A.USER_ID) LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchNm}), '%')

mapper.select:
SELECT FROM TB_CTSNN_MANAGE A WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_CTSNN_MANAGE A WHERE 1=1

SELECT FROM TB_CTSNN_MANAGE A WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_CTSNN_MANAGE A WHERE 1=1
